metadata.description: Curated collection of production-grade agents composed from role-templates and knowledge skills

plugins.name: agent-kit
plugins.description: Production-grade agents named after professions — architect, frontend, backend, devops, sre, security, tester, designer, reviewer, writer. Each agent composes behavioral role-templates with domain knowledge skills across architecture, backend, frontend, security, DevOps, SRE, testing, design, and documentation.
